name: Sue Storm
text: Great Minds — Resource: Exhaust Sue Storm → generate a [mental] resource ([mental] [mental] resources instead if Reed Richards is in play). If you paid for a [[TECH]] card using resources from this ability, ready Sue Storm. (Limit once per round.)

flavor: "I guess I've given away my position."
name: Invisible Woman
text: Boo! — Forced Response: After you attack an enemy, change to your other hero form.

flavor: "Reed, I'm perfectly capable of protecting myself."
name: Invisible Woman
text: Invisible Barrier — Interrupt: When an enemy with 2 ATK or more initiates an attack against you, deal 1 damage to that enemy.

flavor: "A simple plan can often be the best one." —Mister Fantastic
name: Mister Fantastic
text: Response: After Mister Fantastic enters play, remove 1 threat from each scheme or add the top card of your discard pile to your hand.

name: Central City Estate
text: You get +1 REC. Alter-Ego Action: Exhaust Central City Estate → ready Sue Storm.

name: Unstable Uniform
text: Invisible Woman gets +1 DEF. Hero Response: After you change to [[INVISIBLE]] hero form, you get +1 THW until the end of this turn. Hero Response: After you change to [[PSIONIC]] hero form, you get +1 ATK until the end of this turn.

name: Flying Disk
text: If you are in [[PSIONIC]] hero form, you gain the [[AERIAL]] trait and your attacks gain ranged. Hero Action: Discard Flying Disk → deal 4 damage to an enemy.

name: Vanishing Act
text: Hero Action: If you are in [[INVISIBLE]] hero form, exhaust Vanishing Act and spend [mental] [energy] resources → confuse an enemy.

name: Force Shields
text: Hero Action: If you are in [[PSIONIC]] hero form, exhaust Force Shields and discard X cards with a printed [physical] resource → give X friendly characters a tough status card.

name: Incognito
text: Play only if you are in [[INVISIBLE]] hero form. Hero Action: Look at the top 4 cards of the encounter deck. For each star icon looked at this way, draw 1 card.

name: Infiltrate
text: Play only if you are in [[INVISIBLE]] hero form. Hero Action (thwart): Remove up to 4 threat from a scheme or remove up to 2 threat from each scheme.

name: Forceful
text: Play only if you are in [[PSIONIC]] hero form. Hero Action (attack): Discard any number of tough status cards from characters you control → deal 3 damage to the villain for each tough status card discarded this way.

name: Psionic Fields
text: Play only if you are in [[PSIONIC]] hero form. Hero Action (attack): Choose 2 of the following (you may choose the same option twice): • Deal 4 damage to an enemy. • Stun an enemy.

name: Spectral Shift
text: Action: Change your form. Then, if you changed to: [[INVISIBLE]] hero form - Draw 2 cards. [[PSIONIC]] hero form - Draw 1 card.

name: Reed Richards
text: Great Minds — Resource: Exhaust Reed Richards → generate a [mental] resource ([mental] [mental] resources instead if Sue Storm is in play). If you paid for a [[TECH]] card using resources from this ability, ready Reed Richards. (Limit once per round.)

flavor: "I've got powers you haven't even dreamed of!"
name: Mister Fantastic
text: Flexibility — Response: After you spend a [[SUPERPOWER]] card as a resource or discard it from your hand without being played, return it to your hand. (Limit once per phase.)

flavor: "Reed Richards, you are undoubtedly the most stubborn jack ass I've ever known!"
name: Invisible Woman
text: Response: After Invisible Woman enters play, ready your identity.

name: H.E.R.B.I.E.
text: Action: Exhaust H.E.R.B.I.E. → discard X cards from your hand, then draw X cards. Action: Exhaust then discard H.E.R.B.I.E. → draw X cards, then discard X cards from your hand.

name: Baxter Building
text: Alter-Ego Action: Exhaust Baxter Building → heal 2 damage from an identity. Hero Action: Exhaust Baxter Building → search the top 4 cards of your deck for a Mister Fantastic card, then add it to your hand (top 8 instead if your hero has 10 or more hit points remaining).

name: Fantasticar
text: Mister Fantastic gets +1 hand size. Hero Action: Exhaust Fantasticar → choose a player in hero form. Reduce the cost of the next event card that player plays this phase by 1.

flavor: "My costume's molecules shift." —Reed Richards
name: Unstable Uniform
text: Mister Fantastic gets +1 DEF. Hero Response: After you defend against an attack, return the bottommost Mister Fantastic card from your discard pile to your hand.

name: Fantasti-Flare
text: Uses (4 flare counters). Action: Exhaust Fantasti-Flare and remove one flare counter from it → choose a player. Reduce the cost of the next ally that player plays this phase by 1.

name: Neutralizer
text: Play under any player's control. Restricted. Uses (2 charge counters). Hero Interrupt: When you make a basic attack, exhaust Neutralizer and remove one charge counter from it → you get +3 ATK for that attack. That attack gains overkill.

flavor: "I know what I have to do to fix it...to make things right. Every problem can be solved." —Mister Fantastic
name: Stretched Thin
text: Hero Action (thwart): Remove 2 threat from a scheme. Then, if you have no cards remaining in your hand, remove 1 threat from each scheme in play.

flavor: "You know my answer: there's always another way. And we're going to teach you." —Mister Fantastic
name: Big Reach
text: Hero Action (attack): Deal 3 damage to the villain. Then, deal X damage to an enemy, where X is the number of cards remaining in your hand.

flavor: "Good thing I saved some unstable molecules for the towels!" —Mister Fantastic
name: Slippery
text: Interrupt: When you would take any amount of damage, prevent 2 of that damage and draw 2 cards.

flavor: "I'm Reed Richards. Nobody's smarter than me." —Mister Fantastic
name: Mental Gymnastics
text: Hero Action (attack): Deal 2 + X damage to an enemy. Then, if you have no cards remaining in your hand, confuse that enemy.

name: Johnny Storm
text: Ignition — Action: Exhaust Johnny Storm → search the top 4 cards of your deck for a [[FIRE]] card and add it to your hand. If no cards were added to your hand this way, ready Johnny Storm. (Limit once per round.)

flavor: "I am flame! And the nature of flame is to rise!"
name: Human Torch
text: Flame On! — Interrupt: When you place a flame counter on an enemy, deal 1 damage to that enemy. An enemy cannot have more than 3 flame counters on them.

flavor: "Hey, y'know something? I hate to say it, but we make a pretty good team!" —Human Torch
name: The Thing
text: Toughness. Response: After The Thing defends, ready him. (Limit once per phase.)

name: Johnny's Workshop
text: Response: After you change to Johnny Storm, draw 1 card. Response: After you change to Human Torch, ready a [[FIRE]] card.

flavor: "THIS is what you want me to wear?" —Johnny Storm
name: Unstable Uniform
text: Human Torch gets +1 DEF. Hero Response: After you take damage from an attack, place a flame counter on the attacker.

flavor: "FLAME ON!" —Human Torch
name: Internal Combustion
text: Hero Action: Remove 3 flame counters from an enemy and discard Internal Combustion → draw 3 cards.

name: Spark
text: Hero Resource: Exhaust Spark → generate a [energy] resource for a [[FIRE]] card. Hero Action: Exhaust Spark → place a flame counter on an enemy.

flavor: "Don't say it! I'm way ahead of you Boss Man!" —Human Torch
name: Fly-By
text: Hero Action (thwart): Remove 2 threat from a scheme, then remove 1 threat from a scheme for each flame counter on the villain.

flavor: "You want crispy, Reed, you got it!" —Human Torch
name: Blaze and Daze
text: Hero Action (attack): Deal 4 damage to an enemy. Then, if they have 3 flame counters on them, remove all those counters and stun that enemy.

name: Radiate
text: Choose one: Hero Action (attack): Place 2 flame counters on X enemies. Action: Remove all flame counters from X enemies → change your form, then heal 1 damage for each flame counter removed this way (to a maximum of 5).

flavor: "I'm done with this. You want to be entertained? Fine... BE ENTERTAINED." —Human Torch
name: Nova Flame
text: Hero Action (attack): Exhaust Human Torch → place up to 3 flame counters on an enemy, then deal 7 damage to that enemy. This attack gains overkill.

flavor: "Ahh. Time fer some R 'n R!"
name: Ben Grimm
text: Ever-Lovin' Blue-Eyed Thing — Response: After Ben Grimm heals 4 or more damage, give him a tough status card.

name: The Thing
text: Give 'Er — Action: Discard a tough status card from The Thing. Take That! — Response: After you discard a tough status card from The Thing, your attacks deal 1 additional damage until the end of the phase.

name: Human Torch
text: Response: After Human Torch enters play, choose one: • Deal 1 damage to The Thing, then give The Thing a tough status card. • Deal 3 damage to the villain.

flavor: "This fight isn't about brains or brawn. It's about heart. And no one has more heart than my Ben." —Alicia Masters
name: Alicia Masters
text: Alter-Ego Action: Exhaust Alicia Masters → draw 2 cards.

flavor: "Yancy Street Gang ain't lettin' anyone ELSE bother you, Grimm. We want you all to ourselves!"
name: Yancy Street Gang
text: Action: Exhaust Yancy Street Gang → deal 1 damage to a character. This damage gains piercing. If a tough status card was discarded this way, ready Yancy Street Gang.

flavor: "I can hardly move in this monkey suit!" —The Thing
name: Unstable Uniform
text: The Thing gets +1 DEF. Hero Response: After you defend against an attack, draw a card.

flavor: "Not on MY watch, fella!" —The Thing
name: Rock 'Em
text: Hero Action (thwart): Remove 4 threat from a scheme. If this removes the last threat on that scheme, give The Thing a tough status card or confuse the villain.

flavor: "Ya'll never beat me! I'm just too stupid... and ugly... ta know when to quit!" —The Thing
name: True Grit
text: Hero Action: Deal 2 damage to The Thing → ready your hero and discard a status card from him. (Max once per round.)

flavor: "This is Yancy Street! An' we don't bend to nobody!" —The Thing
name: Toughen Up
text: Response: After you take any amount of damage, give your identity a tough status card.

flavor: "Head's Up Handsome--cause I'm gonna knock yers off!" —The Thing
name: Sock 'Em
text: Hero Action (attack): Deal 4 damage to an enemy. If that enemy is defeated by this attack, give The Thing a tough status card or draw a card.

flavor: "Oh, it's time all right." —The Thing
name: It's Clobberin' Time!
text: Hero Action: Make the following 2 attacks: • Deal 4 damage to an enemy. • Deal 4 damage to an enemy.

flavor: "Your Dream-Boat's back!" -Human Torch
name: Pitchback
text: Play only if your identity has the [[AERIAL]] trait. Hero Response (attack): After your hero attacks, deal 4 damage to an enemy.

name: Weenie Roast
text: Attach to a minion. Max 1 per minion. Hero Response: After the player phase ends, place 1 flame counter on attached enemy (to a maximum of 3). Then, deal X damage to attached minion and heal X damage from your hero, where X is equal to the number of flame counters on attached enemy.

name: Afterburn
text: Max 1 per player. Hero Response (attack): After you play an [[AERIAL]] or [[FIRE]] event that damages an enemy, place 1 flame counter on that enemy. If they have 3 or more flame counters on them, remove each flame counter and deal 3 damage to them.

flavor:
"You're all gonna feel the heat on this one!"
-Human Torch
name: Incinerate
text: Hero Action (attack): Remove a card in your hand from the game [acceleration] deal 2 damage to the villain and each minion engaged with you.

flavor: "HA! HA! Burn, you tiny hate goblins!"—Pyro
name: Pyrokinesis
text: Play only if your identity has the [[FIRE]] or [[PSIONIC]] trait. Hero Action: Place up to 3 flame counters on minions divided as you choose. Draw 1 card.

flavor: "Just gimme a sip. I still got this." —The Thing
name: Top Up
text: Action: Heal 4 damage from your identity. If you heal in excess of your maximum hit points this way, give your identity a tough status card.

name: Brace Yourself
text: [[Tactic.]] Hero Action: Give your hero a tough status card. Choose one: • The villain activates against you. Draw a card. • A minion engaged with you activates against you.

name: Knuckle Crackin'
text: Max 1 per player. Hero Interrupt: When you make an attack, exhaust Knuckle Crackin' and discard a tough status card from your hero → this attack deals 3 additional damage.

name: Force Majeure
text: Play only if your identity has the [[PSIONIC]] trait. Max 1 per player. Hero Response: After you remove any amount of threat from 2 or more schemes with a single event, exhaust Force Majeure -> give a Justice (yellow) ally you control a tough status card.

flavor: "I can handle everything going on here, Johnny. Just keep them from getting away!" —Invisible Woman
name: Double Duty
text: Hero Response (thwart): After you change form, remove 1 threat from each scheme in play.

flavor: Funny--I coulda sworn I saw that rock move.
name: Slip Away
text: Response: After you change form, confuse a minion (confuse an enemy instead if you paid for this card using a [wild] resource).

name: Weird Flex
text: Hero Action (attack/thwart): Remove 1 threat from a scheme. If this removes the last threat on that scheme, deal 1 damage to an enemy. If this defeats that enemy, heal 1 damage from a friendly character. If that character has no damage remaining, draw 2 cards.

flavor: "I've found it!" —Reed Richards
name: Eureka!
text: Response: After you play a [[TECH]] card, ready a [[GENIUS]] character.

name: Lend A Hand
text: Max 1 per player. Hero Response: After you add a card to your hand, exhaust Lend a Hand -> reduce the cost of the next Leadership (blue) card you play this phase by 1.

name: Ghost Rider
text: Response: After Ghost Rider attacks an enemy, place 1 flame counter on them. Then, if there are 3 or more flame counters on that enemy, remove each flame counter from them and add either a [[FIRE]] card or a [[SUPERPOWER]] card from your discard pile to your hand.

flavor:
"Looks like I may be a little late for dinner tonight."
--Spider-Man
name: Spider-man
text: Response: After Spider-Man enters play, ready a [[TECH]] support or upgrade you control.

flavor: "Just call us the new FF, Webhead. Now let's go kick some butt and take us some names!"—Wolverine
name: Wolverine
text: Hero Response: After Wolverine enters play from your hand, search the top 5 cards of your deck for an ATTACK event and add it to your hand.

flavor: "Lady, the one of me can stop anybody! But these guys can come along for the ride." —Hulk
name: Hulk
text: Response: After Hulk takes damage, discard the top card of your deck. If a [[SUPERPOWER]] or [[DEFENSE]] card was discarded this way, add it to your hand.

flavor: "I told 'ya they'd be back! My mom and dad always find a way!"
name: Franklin Richards
text: Franklin Richards cannot defend. Resource: Discard Franklin Richards → generate [mental] [wild] resources.

flavor: "We do something drastic now!"
name: Korr
text: Setup. Resource: Discard Korr -> generate a [star] resource (generate [physical] [wild] resources instead if paying for an Aggression (red) or Determination (purple) card.)

flavor: Our compass is curiosity. Destination: inftinite.
name: Mik
text: Setup. Resource: Discard Mik -> generate a [star] resource (generate [mental] [wild] resources instead if paying for a Justice (yellow) or Determination (purple) card.)

flavor: Who I am... is new. Brothers, you have a sister."
name: Tong
text: Setup. Resource: Discard Tong -> generate a [star] resource (generate [energy] [wild] resources instead if paying for a Protection (green) or Determination (purple) card.)

flavor: "Together, we will be succeeding!"
name: Turg
text: Setup. Resource: Discard Turg -> generate a [star] resource (generate [mental] [wild] resources instead if paying for a Leadership (blue) or Determination (purple) card.)

name: Namor
text: [star] Namor's ATK cannot exceed 4. Hero Response: After Namor defeats an enemy, draw 1 card for each point of excess damage dealt. When Defeated: Shuffle Namor into the next player's deck.

name: Cosmic Control Rod
text: Permanent. Setup. First Player Action: Exhaust Cosmic Control Rod -> choose one: • Remove 1 card in your discard pile from the game. • Your hero gets +1 THW and +1 ATK until the end of the round. • Draw 1 card.

name: Omega Room
text: Permanent. Interrupt: When the villain activates against you while you have a facedown encounter card in front of you, exhaust Omega Room -> give a facedown encounter card to the villain as a facedown boost card for this activation. Ready your identity.

flavor: "All better! Thanks for finding everything." —Sue
name: Enhanced Equipment
text: Permanent. First Player Action: Exhaust Enhanced Equipment -> choose a player. Reduce the damage dealt by each minion engaged with that player by 1 until the end of the round.

flavor: "Thank you for your assistance!" —H.E.R.B.I.E.
name: H.e.r.b.i.e. Mk. Ii
text: Permanent. First Player Action: Exhaust H.E.R.B.I.E. Mk. II -> choose a player. That player may discard X cards from their hand, then draw X cards.

flavor: "Now we've got their number!" —Reed
name: Enhanced Security
text: Permanent. First Player Action: Exhaust Enhanced Security -> Choose a player to engage a minion. Each minion engaged with that player gets -1 SCH until the end of the round.
